c.d: The number of active users on the platform, which indicates the popularity and reach of the app.
The simplicity and intuitiveness of the app's interface and listing process.
c.s: App Store reviews, Google Play reviews, Expert reviews

c.d: The charges and commissions imposed by the platform on each sale.
The variety and quality of features available for creating and managing listings.
The measures and policies in place to protect sellers from fraud and disputes.
The security and reliability of the payment process within the app.
The quality and responsiveness of the app's customer support services.
c.s: App Store reviews, Google Play reviews, User reviews
